title: Crisp Beef Tagine
description: A twist on traditional Moroccan tagine, this dish features crispy beef and a tangy citrus sauce.

ingredients.name: Beef (thinly sliced)
ingredients.notes: Cut into thin strips for crispy exterior

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine beef strips, citrus juice, and Syrian olive oil. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Remove beef from marinade and sear for 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Transfer beef to a plate and set aside. Reduce heat to medium.
4. Add chopped onion to skillet and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
5. Add tagine spices to skillet and stir to combine.
6. Return beef to skillet and stir to coat with spice mixture.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until beef is cooked through.
8. Garnish with chopped crisp and serve hot.
